CMS Chronic Conditions Data Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Value Modifier Practice-Level RIF / Performance Year 2016
Version - August 2018
Variable Name	Variable Label (Short Description)	Long Description	Position	Format	Length	Notes
PRACTICE_ID	Unique identifier of practice	Unique identifier of practice	1	Char	11	
PRACTICE_NAME	Name of practice found in PECOS	Full Medical Group Practice Name	2	Char	70	
STATE	Location (state) of practice	State in which practice is located	3	Char	2	
GET_REPORT	Full QRUR received	Indicator for whether practice received full Quality and Resource Use Report (QRUR)	4	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice received a full Quality and Resource Use Report (QRUR)
VM_PAYMENT_ADJ_POST_IR	Value Modifier payment adjustment (post-IR)	Updated Value Modifier payment adjustment after Informal Review process	5	Char	8	AF stands for Adjustment Factor.
VM_PAYMENT_ADJ	Value Modifier payment adjustment (pre-IR)	Value Modifier payment adjustment before Informal Review process for practices subject to the Value Modifier	6	Char	8	AF stands for Adjustment Factor.
VM_CHANGE	Value Modifier payment adjustment change	Indicator for whether Value Modifier was updated due to Informal Review	7	Num	8	Equals 1 if Value Modifier was updated due to Informal Review. If Value Modifier changed due to Informal Review, then Value Modifier is captured in VM_PAYMENT_ADJ_POST_IR variable.
PARENT_ACO	ACO Parent practice	Shared Savings Program Accountable Care Organization (ACO) parent for practice	8	Char	6	
MSSP	Practice enrolled in MSSP	Indicator for whether practice was a MSSP ACO practice in performance year 2016	9	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice was a MSSP ACO practice in performance year 2016
GPRO	GPRO practice	Indicator for whether practice registered to report data to the PQRS via the Group Practice Reporting Option (GPRO)	10	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice registered to report data to the PQRS via the Group Practice Reporting Option (GPRO)
GPRO_MECH	GPRO reporting mechanism (text)	Group Practice Reporting Option (GPRO) mechanism through which practice reported quality data to the PQRS	11	Char	40	
GPRO_EVAL	Practice evaluated for meeting minimum reporting requirements based on GPRO data	Indicator for whether practice evaluated for meeting minimum PQRS reporting requirements based on GPRO data	12	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice evaluated for meeting minimum PQRS reporting requirements based on GPRO data
CAT1	(For VM-eligible TINs only) TIN meets minimum reporting requirement		13	Num	8	Equals 1 If VM-eligible TIN meets minimum reporting requirement
CAT2	(For VM-eligible TINs only) TIN does not meet minimum reporting requirement		14	Num	8	Equals 1 If VM-eligible TIN does not meet minimum reporting requirement
CATEGORY_POST_IR	Practice met minimum PQRS reporting requirements (post-IR)	Practice met minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements after Informal Review process	15	Char	4	CAT1=Practice subject to the 2018 Value Modifier and met minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, CAT2=Practice subject to the 2018 Value Modifier and did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
CATEGORY	Practice met minimum PQRS reporting requirements (pre-IR)	Practice met minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements before Informal Review process	16	Char	4	CAT1=Practice subject to the 2018 Value Modifier and met minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, CAT2=Practice subject to the 2018 Value Modifier and did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
MET_MIN_REPORTING_REQ_POST_IR	Practice met the minimum reporting requirement (post-IR)	Indicator for whether practice met the minimum reporting requirement after Informal Review process	17	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice met the minimum reporting requirement after Informal Review process
MET_MIN_REPORTING_REQ	Practice met the minimum reporting requirement (pre-IR)	Indicator for whether practice met the minimum reporting requirement before Informal Review process	18	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice met the minimum reporting requirement before Informal Review process
MET_MIN_REPORTING_REQ_ACO	Practice's SSP ACO successfully reported to the PQRS to avoid the PQRS payment adjustment	Practice's Medicare Shared Savings Program Accountable Care Organization successfully reported to the PQRS to avoid the PQRS payment adjustment	19	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice's SSP ACO successfully reported to the PQRS to avoid the PQRS payment adjustment
MET_MIN_UNSATIS_ACO	Practice's SSP ACO did not successfully report to the PQRS but the practice met the minimum reporting requirement outside of the ACO	Practice's Medicare Shared Savings Program Accountable Care Organization (ACO) did not successfully report to the PQRS to avoid the PQRS payment adjustment but the practice met the minimum reporting requirement outside of the ACO	20	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice's SSP ACO did not successfully report to the PQRS but the practice met the minimum reporting requirement outside of the ACO
PCT_AVOIDED_PAY_ADJ_POST_IR	Percent of EPs in a practice who avoided the PQRS payment adjustment (post-IR)	Percent of individual eligible professionals in practice who avoided the 2018 PQRS payment adjustment after Informal Review process	21	Num	8	
PCT_AVOIDED_PAY_ADJ	Percent of EPs in a practice who avoided the 2018 PQRS payment adjustment (pre-IR)	Percent of individual eligible professionals in practice who avoided the 2018 PQRS payment adjustment before Informal Review process	22	Num	8	
IEP_50_PERCENT_RULE_POST_IR	Practice had at least 50% of EPs who met minimum PQRS reporting requirements (post-IR)	Indicator for whether 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements after Informal Review process	23	Num	8	Equals 1 if 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
IEP_50_PERCENT_RULE	Practice had at least 50% of EPs who met minimum PQRS reporting requirements (pre-IR)	Indicator for whether 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements before Informal Review process	24	Num	8	Equals 1 if 50 percent or more of eligible professionals in practice met the 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
NUMTR_50_PCT_RULE_POST_IR	Numerator for IEP 50% rule calculation (post-IR)	Number of eligible professionals in practice who individually met the minimum reporting criteria to avoid the 2018 PQRS payment adjustment after Informal Review process (Numerator for the 50 percent rule calculation)	25	Num	8	
NUMTR_50_PCT_RULE	Numerator for IEP 50% rule calculation (pre-IR)	Number of eligible professionals in practice who individually met the minimum reporting criteria to avoid the 2018 PQRS payment adjustment before Informal Review process (Numerator for the 50 percent rule calculation)	26	Num	8	
CAHPS_ELECT_REGDATA	Elected CAHPS to be included in Quality Composite	Indicator for whether practice elected to include CAHPS measures in Quality Composite Score	27	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice elected to include CAHPS measures in Quality Composite Score.
CAHPS_REPORTING_REGDATA	Registered to report CAHPS data	Indicator for whether practice registered to report CAHPS data	28	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice registered to report CAHPS data
COST_COMP_TIER_POST_IR	Cost Composite Tier (post-IR)	Cost Composite Tier indicator after Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Cost Composite Tier is applied to practices with Cost Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean.	29	Num	8	1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
COST_COMP_TIER	Cost Composite Tier (pre-IR)	Cost Composite Tier indicator before Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Cost Composite Tier is applied to practices with Cost Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean.	30	Num	8	1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
QUAL_COMP_TIER_POST_IR	Quality Composite Tier (post-IR)	Quality Composite Tier indicator after Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Quality Composite Tier is applied to practices with Quality Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean.	31	Num	8	1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
QUAL_COMP_TIER	Quality Composite Tier (pre-IR)	Quality Composite Tier indicator before Informal Review process: low, average, or high. Average Quality Composite Tier is applied to practices with Quality Composite Scores that are more than 1 standard deviation from the peer group mean but not statistically significantly different from the peer group mean.	32	Num	8	1=Low, 2=Average, 3=High, .=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements
COST_COMP_TIER_TEXT_POST_IR	Cost Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (post-IR)	Cost Composite Tier value determined based on Cost Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) after Informal Review process	33	Char	40	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation below benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark, Average=Practice's Cost Composite Score is less than one standard deviation away from the benchmark, practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation from benchmark but not statistically significantly different from benchmark, or practice does not have at least minimum number of eligible cases for any cost measures included in Cost Composite, High=Practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation above benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark.
COST_COMP_TIER_TEXT	Cost Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (pre-IR)	Cost Composite Tier value determined based on Cost Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) before Informal Review process	34	Char	8	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation below benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark, Average=Practice's Cost Composite Score is less than one standard deviation away from the benchmark, practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation from benchmark but not statistically significantly different from benchmark, or practice does not have at least minimum number of eligible cases for any cost measures included in Cost Composite, High=Practice's Cost Composite Score is at least one standard deviation above benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark.
QUAL_COMP_TIER_TEXT_POST_IR	Quality Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (post-IR)	Quality Composite Tier value determined based on Quality Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) after Informal Review process	35	Char	40	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation below benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark, Average=Practice's Quality Composite Score is less than one standard deviation away from the benchmark, practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation from benchmark but not statistically significantly different from benchmark, or practice does not have at least minimum number of eligible cases for any quality measures with prior-year benchmark included in Quality Composite, High=Practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation above benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark.
QUAL_COMP_TIER_TEXT	Quality Composite Tier: High, Average, Low, N/A (pre-IR)	Quality Composite Tier value determined based on Quality Composite Tier (High, Average, Low, N/A) before Informal Review process	36	Char	8	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Low=Practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation below benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark, Average=Practice's Quality Composite Score is less than one standard deviation away from the benchmark, practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation from benchmark but not statistically significantly different from benchmark, or practice does not have at least minimum number of eligible cases for any quality measures with prior-year benchmark included in Quality Composite, High=Practice's Quality Composite Score is at least one standard deviation above benchmark and statistically significantly different from benchmark.
ZB_COST_CMPSCR_POOL_RND	(Rounded) Standardized Cost Composite Score	Standardized Cost Composite Score, rounded to the nearest 0.01	37	Num	8	
ZB_QUAL_CMPSCR_POOL_RND	(Rounded) Standardized Quality Composite Score	Standardized Quality Composite Score, rounded to the nearest 0.01	38	Num	8	These scores do not reflect a negligible change to some practices’ 30-day All-Cause Hospital Readmission rate that did not change the Value Modifier payment adjustment for any but one practice.
ELIG_UP_ADJUST_POST_IR	Eligible for high-risk bonus adjustment (post-IR)	Indicator for whether practice eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries  after Informal Review process	39	Char	12	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Elig=Practice eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries, Not Elig=Practice not eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries.
ELIG_UP_ADJUST	Eligible for high-risk bonus adjustment (pre-IR)	Indicator for whether practice eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries before Informal Review process	40	Char	12	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements, Elig=Practice eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries, Not Elig=Practice not eligible for additional upward payment adjustment for treating disproportionate share of high-risk beneficiaries.
QUAL_COST_RISK_BONUS_POST_IR	Strong quality and cost performance for high-risk bonus adjustment (post-IR)	Indicator for whether practice designated as High Quality/Low Cost, High Quality/Average Cost, or Average Quality/Low Cost after Informal Review process	41	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice designated as High Quality/Low Cost, High Quality/Average Cost, or Average Quality/Low Cost
QUAL_COST_RISK_BONUS	Strong quality and cost performance for high-risk bonus adjustment (pre-IR)	Indicator for whether practice designated as High Quality/Low Cost, High Quality/Average Cost, or Average Quality/Low Cost before Informal Review process	42	Num	8	Equals 1 if practice designated as High Quality/Low Cost, High Quality/Average Cost, or Average Quality/Low Cost
PMT_ADJ_CAT_POST_IR	Payment adjustment category, based on Cost Composite Tier and Quality Composite Tier (post-IR)	Payment adjustment category, based on Cost Composite Tier and Quality Composite Tier after Informal Review process	43	Char	18	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
PMT_ADJ_CAT	Payment adjustment category, based on Cost Composite Tier and Quality Composite Tier (pre-IR)	Payment adjustment category, based on Cost Composite Tier and Quality Composite Tier before Informal Review process	44	Char	18	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
AC_HQ_ADJ	Adjustment value for practices with Average Cost and High Quality	Upward payment adjustment value if practice had Average Cost and High Quality	45	Char	6	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
LC_AQ_ADJ	Adjustment value for practices with Low Cost and Average Quality	Upward payment adjustment value if practice had Low Cost and Average Quality	46	Char	6	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
LC_HQ_ADJ	Adjustment value for practices with Low Cost and High Quality	Upward payment adjustment value if practice had Low Cost and High Quality	47	Char	6	N/A=Practice did not meet minimum 2016 PQRS reporting requirements.
